HGSS.426.0000:
Welcome!\f
Would you like some Scratch-Off Cards?
They’re three for [0132,0000,0000] BP.\f
HGSS.426.0001:
Will you buy some
Scratch-Off Cards? [0200,0000]
HGSS.426.0006:
You may buy three Scratch-Off Cards
for [0132,0000,0000] BP.\f
Hidden on each Scratch-Off Card are
icons of Pokémon.\f
You may scratch the film off a card
three times.\f
If the same icon appears three times,
you will win a prize, like a Berry!\f
HGSS.426.0007:
It is [0132,0002,0000] BP for three Scratch-Off
Cards. Is that OK? [0200,0000]
HGSS.426.0010:
OK, please select three
Scratch-Off Cards.\f
HGSS.426.0011:
Congratulations!\f
You won on [0132,0000,0000] Scratch-Off Card(s)!\f
HGSS.426.0012:
Too bad! There is no more room for
the [0108,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.426.0014:
I’m sorry, but you don’t have enough
BP. Please come again.
HGSS.426.0015:
Welcome!
Would you like some Scratch-Off Cards?\f
You may buy three Scratch-Off Cards
for [0132,0000,0000] BP.\f
Hidden on each Scratch-Off Card are
icons of Pokémon.\f
You may scratch the obscuring film off 
a card three times.\f
If the same icon appears three times,
you will win a prize, like a Berry.\f
Also, DITTO’s icon can transform into
any other Pokémon.\f
Good luck matching Pokémon icons!\f
